plates.caption: Some snakes can glide through the air
plates.voiceover: Some snakes can glide through the air.
plates.visual: snake launching from a high branch into open air

plates.caption: no wings
plates.visual: airborne snake, no wings, full body readable

plates.caption: they flatten their body
plates.voiceover: They flatten their body like a long moving airfoil.
plates.visual: body visibly flattened wider like a ribbon

plates.caption: they wave side to side
plates.voiceover: Then they wave side to side while falling forward.

plates.caption: steering tree to tree
plates.voiceover: That motion helps them steer from one tree to another.
plates.visual: snake gliding toward another tree branch
